name: Gai Thom Kha
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash lemon grass and trim root ends and tough layers. Slice bottom 6 inches thinly.
2. Chop 1 tablespoon of the lemon grass.
3. Puree chopped lemon grass, 1 tablespoon of sliced ginger, garlic, peppercorns, coriander roots, and shallots.
4. Bring 1 cup of coconut milk to a boil and add the lemon grass mixture.
5. While stirring, reduce heat to medium and add chicken, remaining coconut milk, ginger slices, and lemon grass.
6. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered until chicken is tender.
7. Season with chilies, fish sauce, and lime juice.
8. Decorate servings with lime leaves and coriander sprigs.
To make coconut milk:
- Blend 2 cups fresh or frozen grated coconut with water.
- Strain through double cheesecloth, pressing out all liquid. This is thick coconut milk.
- To get thin coconut milk, add warm water to the residue from the first straining. Let stand 5 minutes, then press as before.
- For coconut cream, refrigerate after pressing; the cream will rise to the top. Refrigerate or freeze. Two cups of coconut makes 3 cups of thick milk, of which 6 tablespoons is cream.
